title: Non-record: 1.1201 BPB - Shared ValueEmbedding (tok_emb reuse, layers 5-10) + Legal TTT
body:
## Summary

- Reuses tied `tok_emb` for ValueEmbedding instead of training a separate embedding table, with learned projection + per-layer scales
- Freed parameter budget allows expanding VE from 2 layers (9-10) to 6 layers (5-10)
- Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Parameter Banking + Legal TTT)
- **3-seed mean: 1.1201 bpb (std 0.0002)**

## Results (8xH100 80GB SXM)

| Seed | Steps | Pre-TTT bpb | Post-TTT bpb | Artifact |
|------|-------|-------------|-------------|----------|
| 1337 | 7,065 | 1.1221 | **1.1199** | 16,024,522 |
| 42 | 7,066 | 1.1224 | **1.1202** | 15,827,158 |
| 2025 | 7,067 | 1.1225 | **1.1203** | 15,839,486 |
| **Mean** | **7,066** | **1.1223** | **1.1201** | |

## Key Change

```python
# Before (PR #549): separate VE embedding, layers 9-10
self.ve_shared = ValueEmbedding(vocab_size, ve_dim=128, model_dim=kv_dim)

# After: reuse tok_emb, layers 5-10
self.ve_shared = ValueEmbedding(vocab_size, ve_dim=128, model_dim=kv_dim, tok_emb=self.tok_emb)
```

tok_emb already encodes rich token identity from full gradient signal. A separate VE table initialized from scratch can't match that in limited training steps.

## Test plan
- [x] 3-seed validation (1337, 42, 2025) — all under 16MB, consistent results
- [x] Legal TTT protocol verified (score-first, inference_mode)
- [x] Logs included for all seeds
